description: Returns the time it took to perform the last update, clamped to a maximum of 0.1 seconds.

notes.title: See also
notes.text:
* DeltaTime returns the same value as this node, but clamped to a maximum of 0.1 seconds.
* SmoothDeltaTime tries to smooth out the delta time to minimize interference from stutters.

ProtoFlux:Time
ContinuouslyChanging nodes
